title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Firstcry Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Firstcry Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Firstcry Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Firstcry Digital Technologies:
Firstcry Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry Digital Technologies!
